zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir George Conyers於大約1510年出生在英國達勒姆索可本時，他的父親Sir Thomas Conyers Knt.21歲，母親Margaret Radcliffe22歲。他於大約1533年與Anne Dawney結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1567年10月15日在英國英格蘭達勒姆享年58歲，埋葬在英國達勒姆維頓 勒 維亞爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir George Conyers于大约1510年出生在英国達勒姆索可本时，他的父亲Sir Thomas Conyers Knt.21岁，母亲Margaret Radcliffe22岁。他于大约1533年与Anne Dawney结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1567年10月15日在英国英格兰達勒姆享年58岁，埋葬在英国達勒姆維頓 勒 維亞爾。

nameMeanings.name: Conyers
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Yorkshire, of Norman origin): habitational name from either of two places in northern France, Coignières in Seine-et-Oise or Cogners in Sarthe. Alternatively, a variant of Conyer , with genitival or post-medieval excrescent -s.

variants.name: Conyer
meanings: English: occupational name for a minter, a coiner of money, from an agent derivative of Old French coignier ‘to stamp money, to mint’.

nameMeanings.name: George
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Via Old French and Latin, from Greek Georgios (a derivative of geōrgos ‘farmer’, from gē ‘earth’ + ergein ‘to work’). This was the name of several early saints, including the shadowy figure who is now the patron of England (as well as of Germany and Portugal). If the saint existed at all, he was perhaps martyred in Palestine in the persecutions of Christians instigated by the Emperor Diocletian at the beginning of the 4th century. The popular legend in which the hero slays a dragon is a medieval Italian invention. He was for a long time a more important saint in the Orthodox Church than in the West, and the name was not much used in England during the Middle Ages, even after St George came to be regarded as the patron of England in the 14th century. Its use increased from the 1400s, and by 1500 it was regularly among the most popular male names. This popularity was reinforced when George I came to the throne in 1714 , bringing this name with him from Germany. It has been one of the most popular English boys' names ever since.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir George Conyers was born about 1510, in Sockburn, Durham, England, his father, Sir Thomas Conyers Knt., was 21 and his mother, Margaret Radcliffe, was 22. He married Anne Dawney about 1533. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 4 daughters. He died on 15 October 1567, in Durham, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 58, and was buried in Witton le Wear, Durham, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir George Conyers est né environ 1510, à Sockburn, Durham, Angleterre, son père, Sir Thomas Conyers Knt., avait 21 ans et sa mère, Margaret Radcliffe, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé Anne Dawney environ 1533. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé le 15 octobre 1567, à Durham, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 58 ans, et a été enterré à Witton le Wear, Durham, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir George Conyers um 1510 in Sockburn, Durham, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Thomas Conyers Knt. 21 und seine Mutter Margaret Radcliffe 22. Er hat um 1533 Anne Dawney geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb am 15. Oktober 1567 im Alter von 58 Jahren in Durham, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Witton le Wear, Durham, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir George Conyers è nato il circa 1510 nel Sockburn, Durham, England, il suo padre, Sir Thomas Conyers Knt., aveva 21 anni e il suo madre, Margaret Radcliffe, aveva 22 anni. Lui sposato Anne Dawney circa 1533. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli e 4 figlie. Morì il 15 ottobre 1567, nel Durham, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 58 anni, e fu sepolto a Witton le Wear, Durham, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir George Conyersが約1510年にイギリスダルハムソクブルンで生まれた時，父Sir Thomas Conyers Knt.は21歳，母Margaret Radcliffeは22歳であった。約1533年にAnne Dawneyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1567年10月15日にイギリスイギリスダルハムで58歳で死去し，イギリスダルハムウィットオン ル ウエアルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir George Conyers(이)가 대략 1510년 영국 뒤람 속번에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Thomas Conyers Knt.(은)는 21세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Radcliffe(은)는 22세였다. 그는 대략 1533년 Anne Dawney(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1567년 10월 15일 영국 잉글랜드 뒤람에서 58세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 뒤람 윗튼 일 위르에 묻혔다.

mn.Sockburn, Durham, England: Sockburn, Durham, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir George Conyers nasceu aproximadamente 1510, em Sockburn, Durham, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Thomas Conyers Knt., tinha 21 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Radcliffe, tinha 22 anos. Ele casou-se com Anne Dawney aproximadamente 1533. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em 15 de outubro de 1567, em Durham, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 58 anos, e foi sepultado em Witton le Wear, Durham, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir George Conyers родился около 1510 г. в местности соккбурн, дурам, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Thomas Conyers Knt. было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Margaret Radcliffe, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Anne Dawney около 1533 г. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 4 дочери. Он умер 15 октября 1567 г. в местности дурам, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 58 лет и был похоронен в местности виттон л вир, дурам, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir George Conyers nació aproximadamente 1510, en Sockburn, Durham, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Thomas Conyers Knt., tenía 21 años y su mamá, Margaret Radcliffe, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Anne Dawney aproximadamente 1533. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió el 15 de octubre de 1567, en Durham, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 58 años, y fue sepultado en Witton le Wear, Durham, Inglaterra.
